sections.content:
**AI can cut your meeting prep time by 80%.** Before, during, and after meetings, AI handles the scaffolding so you can focus on the substance.

**Before meetings:**
- Generate agendas from a brief description of the meeting's goal
- Draft pre-read documents and briefings
- Summarize background material so you arrive informed
- Prepare talking points and anticipated objections

**During meetings (real-time):**
- Some tools offer live transcription and note-taking
- You can capture rough notes and ask AI to clean them up immediately after

**After meetings:**
- Transform raw notes into structured meeting summaries
- Extract action items with owners and deadlines
- Draft follow-up emails and Slack messages
- Turn decisions into documentation

The highest-ROI meeting use: **converting rough notes to structured summaries in 60 seconds.** Paste your notes, ask for decisions + action items + owners, get a clean document you can send immediately.

sections.good: Convert these rough meeting notes into a structured summary. Participants: Alice (CEO), Bob (CTO), me (Product Manager). Include: (1) decisions made with who made them, (2) action items in a table with columns: Owner, Task, Deadline, (3) open questions still unresolved, (4) a one-sentence TL;DR for the top of the email. My notes: [paste notes]
sections.explanation: The vague prompt produces a paragraph retelling. The specific prompt produces a structured, formatted, immediately shareable summary. The table format for action items is particularly useful — it's easy to scan and holds people accountable. Always specify the participants so AI knows context.

sections.prompt: Put these meeting workflow steps in the right order for maximum efficiency:

steps: Use AI to draft the follow-up email and action item list
Generate an agenda using AI based on meeting goal and participants
Take rough notes during the meeting
Paste notes into AI and generate a structured summary
data.explanation: The efficient workflow: draft agenda before (so everyone comes prepared), take notes during, clean them up with AI immediately after, draft and send the follow-up. The critical step is doing the AI processing right after the meeting while context is fresh — waiting 24 hours means cold notes that need more work.

sections.prompt: Which AI-assisted meeting task will have the highest impact on your team's productivity?

choices: Having AI attend meetings instead of you
Converting rough notes to structured summaries with action items, owners, and deadlines immediately after every meeting
Having AI write your meeting contributions in advance
Using AI to generate automated meeting invites
data.explanation: Post-meeting action item documentation is the highest-leverage meeting task because it directly determines follow-through. Most meetings lose momentum because action items aren't captured clearly or shared promptly. AI can produce a clean, shareable summary in under 2 minutes — making consistent follow-through effortless.
